query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN liverId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_liver_id, SUM(CASE WHEN liverId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_liver_id FROM brand_livestreams WHERE streamerName LIKE '%ryukyogoku%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN liverId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as null_liver_id, SUM(CASE WHEN liverId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_liver_id FROM brand_livestreams WHERE streamerName LIKE '%ryukyogoku%';
